text: Did you know earthquake waves can unlock secrets about our planet? Two main types of seismic waves exist: P waves and S waves. P waves compress and travel faster. They’re the first to arrive. S waves shear and arrive later, revealing more about the quake's intensity. Detecting these waves helps scientists locate quakes and assess damage. Want to learn more about our planet's mysteries? Hit subscribe!
